programmes.show_description: The voice of your childhood Derek Griffiths with 40 of those tunes you pestered your parents to buy - all top pop moments that still bring a smile & happy memories of school days!

programmes.show_name: Help Me Make It Through the Night!
programmes.show_description: Non-stop love songs, back to back all night, from the era of Leo Sayer, Carpenters, The Bee Gees & Minnie Ripperton.
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1976!
Another 60 minutes of heatwave hits & headlines from a year of contrasts - Punk, Dancing Queen, the Inter-City 125, the Honey Monster & that year's top toy - Swingball!

Another batch of silly songs, dodgy videos & novelty hits from the 70s. Yes every one of these was a huge hit!

programmes.show_name: What The Heck Kept This Off No.1?
programmes.show_description: Every one of these superb No.2 hits from 1970-1979 is a classic, but what other songs stopped each of them getting to the top? Queen, Ringo, Elton, Boney M and more are all here!

programmes.show_name: I'm Stone In Love With You!
programmes.show_description: Crackling vinyl, shag carpets & lava lamp glows - this is how we loved in the 70s! Oh James...
